_comment: Machine-readable record of the manifest version and date at which each clinical safety document was last formally reviewed and signed off by the Clinical Safety Officer (CSO). Update this file — not check-doc-versions.js — whenever a CSO review is completed. The check script reads these entries to compute 'minor releases behind' and escalate accordingly.

incremental_reviews.scope: Clinical-matching changes only (single ACB scorer, STOPP NSAID/aspirin term parity, completeness + contract-test CI).

docs.notes: CSN v3.10. FULL CSO clinical-hazard re-baseline completed at 3.115.0 (Dr Dave Triska, 2026-06-17, signed off by merge): the 3.64->3.113 backlog was closed — §2 intended-purpose updated for the Record tab, Practice Report/Condor, CQC Inspection Readiness, result-rule expansions and chrome/attestation additions; known-limitations 36 (Record snapshot/gap-markers), 37 (CQC supporting-evidence-not-proof) and 38 (Select-all) added; the v3.91.2 attribute-injection-XSS remediation and PDF.js 4.x upgrade are covered via HAZARD-LOG. Prior baseline was 3.64.0 (2026-06-13).

incremental_reviews.scope: Added H-031 (cross-surface clinical-score divergence, closed by the single ACB scorer); updated H-016/H-006 controls.

docs.notes: Hazard Log v3.11. FULL CSO hazard re-baseline completed at 3.115.0 (Dr Dave Triska, 2026-06-17, signed off by merge): the 3.64->3.113 backlog was closed — new hazards H-032 (Record snapshot misread as complete record), H-033 (CQC pack misread as compliance proof/coverage), H-034 (Select-all bulk action); control updates to H-002/H-006/H-007/H-009/H-016/H-022/H-023/H-024/H-028/H-030, including the v3.91.2 attribute-injection-XSS remediation (H-009), the PDF.js 4.x / CVE-2024-4367 upgrade (SOUP), and the v3.100.0 critical-low-Hb 100->80 g/L threshold change (H-030). Prior baseline was 3.64.0 (2026-06-13).
SOUP v1.9. Reissued at 3.115.0 on 2026-06-17: PDF.js 4.2.67 (CVE-2024-4367 patched), Chart.js 4.4.1 and D3.js 7.8.5 all confirmed unchanged.

Feature list at v3.115.0; ledger aligned to the doc header (the list was regenerated alongside the 3.115.0 CSO baseline). Bookkeeping desync corrected — was recorded as 3.113.0 while the doc read 3.115.0.
